ff_faq1_q: 设备能满足大规模量产吗？
ff_faq1_a: 能。根据产能需求提供不同规格的设备，从中小批量到大容量产线都有对应方案。建议带上日产量需求来咨询。

ff_faq3_q: 设备符合食品安全认证要求吗？
ff_faq3_a: 设备采用食品级材质，生产过程可追溯。具体的认证要求建议联系销售，我们提供设备相关的合规资料。
ff_faq4_a: 设备到货后即可投入使用，无需复杂安装。台式设备插电即用，大型设备根据现场条件一般 1-3 天完成布置。
ff_faq5_a: {brand}承诺整机1年、核心配件（IGBT、线圈、锅体）3年质保。产品经多年迭代，易损位置已强化。精妙的快拆装设计让更换更简便，发货即多配易损件。非人为损坏由当地售后团队极速上门免费维修，10大仓储提供强力支持，让您安心使用。
ff_faq6_a: 可以。设备支持自定义菜谱录入，你可以将专属配方的火候、翻炒参数保存下来，确保每批产品一致。

news_1_body:
在刚刚落幕的 2026 亚洲餐饮博览会上，{brand} 携全新第五代智能炒菜机器人震撼亮相，成为全场瞩目的焦点。本届博览会在泰国曼谷举办，吸引了来自东南亚、南亚及中东地区的 2000 余家餐饮企业参展。

{brand} 第五代智能炒菜机器人在前代产品的基础上实现了全面升级，搭载了全新一代 AI 烹饪引擎，支持超过 800 道中餐、东南亚菜和西餐菜谱。设备采用精准温控系统和自适应翻炒技术，烹饪一致性达到 99.5%，远超行业平均水平。

展会现场，{brand} 展位人头攒动，来自泰国、越南、马来西亚、印尼等地的 200 余家餐饮品牌代表亲身体验了设备的操作流程。多家连锁餐饮集团当场表达了合作意向，预计未来六个月内将完成首批 50 台设备的交付和部署。

{brand} CEO 在接受媒体采访时表示："我们的目标不仅是提供一台智能设备，更是为餐饮企业打造一套完整的智能化厨房解决方案。通过 AI 技术和物联网平台的深度融合，{brand} 将帮助客户实现从前端备菜到出餐全流程的标准化和自动化，大幅降低人工成本，同时保证每一份菜品的高品质和一致性。"

此外，{brand} 还在博览会上发布了全新的云端管理平台，支持远程监控设备运行状态、自动预警维护需求、一键推送菜谱更新等功能，进一步提升了商用厨房的运营效率和智能化水平。
news_1_summary: 在此次博览会上，{brand} 展出了全新的第五代智能炒菜机器人，凭借 99.5% 的烹饪一致性和 70% 的人工成本节省，吸引了来自东南亚 200+ 餐饮品牌的关注。
news_1_title: {brand} 智能炒菜机器人亮相 2026 亚洲餐饮博览会
news_2_body:
东南亚领先的连锁餐饮品牌宣布在其全线 86 家门店中批量部署 {brand} 全自动烹饪流水线，标志着商用厨房自动化在该地区进入规模化落地阶段。该项目总投资超过 1200 万美元，是 {brand} 在东南亚市场迄今最大的单笔订单。

该连锁品牌旗下拥有快餐、休闲餐饮和正餐三大业务板块，覆盖泰国、越南和柬埔寨三国市场。通过引入 {brand} 全自动烹饪流水线，品牌在中央厨房实现了从食材预处理、自动烹饪到成品分装的全程自动化生产，单店日均出餐量提升了 3 倍，人力成本降低了 65%。

项目分三个阶段推进：第一阶段在 30 家核心门店完成设备安装和调试，第二阶段覆盖剩余 56 家门店，第三阶段上线 {brand} 云端管理平台，实现全网络的统一调度和数据分析。

该品牌运营总监表示："{brand} 的设备在试运行期间表现出色，菜品品质的高度一致性让我们的顾客满意度显著提升。更重要的是，{brand} 团队提供了全方位的售后服务和技术支持，让我们在整个部署过程中感到非常安心。"

{brand} 东南亚区负责人透露，此次合作的成功落地为公司在整个东南亚市场的拓展奠定了坚实基础。目前已有多个国家的餐饮企业正在与 {brand} 洽谈类似规模的自动化改造项目，预计 2026 年下半年将迎来新一轮的订单高峰。
news_2_summary: 该品牌在其 86 家门店中安装了 {brand} 烹饪流水线，实现了中央厨房标准化生产，单店日均出餐量提升 3 倍。
news_2_title: 东南亚连锁餐饮品牌批量部署 {brand} 全自动烹饪流水线
news_3_body:
经过为期六个月的严格审核和现场检验，{brand} 全系列产品成功通过 ISO 9001:2015 国际质量管理体系认证和欧盟 CE 安全合规认证，标志着公司在产品质量管控和国际市场准入方面迈上了新台阶。

ISO 9001:2015 认证要求企业在质量管理体系的各个方面达到国际标准，包括研发设计、生产制造、供应链管理、售后服务等全流程。审核机构对 {brand} 的质量管控体系给予了高度评价，特别认可了公司在原材料溯源、生产过程标准化控制以及产品出厂检验方面的严谨做法。

CE 认证则是进入欧盟市场的强制性准入要求，涉及电气安全、机械安全、电磁兼容等多个维度的严格检测。{brand} 全系列智能烹饪设备均顺利通过了所有测试项目，证明了产品在安全性和可靠性方面已达到国际一流水准。

{brand} 质量管理总监表示："双认证的获得是公司长期坚持质量优先战略的重要成果。我们投入了大量资源建设质量管理体系，从供应商筛选到最终产品交付，每个环节都有严格的标准和流程。这两项认证不仅是对我们现有工作的认可，更是持续改进的动力。"

目前，{brand} 正在积极推进美国 UL 认证和日本 JIS 认证的申请工作，预计将在 2026 年底前完成，届时公司将具备覆盖全球主要市场的完整认证体系，为进一步拓展国际市场提供有力支撑。
news_3_summary: 经过严格审核，{brand} 全系列产品通过国际质量管理体系认证和欧盟安全合规认证，为全球客户提供更可靠的产品保障。

support_install_faq_a1: 请确保安装现场具备基本电力、给排水和通风条件。每台设备在出厂前已经过完整调试和测试，到货后通电即可使用，安装服务主要是帮你规划摆放位置、完成管线连接。我们会提前提供环境要求清单，并在勘测阶段做最终确认。
support_install_faq_a2: 单台设备到店后安装就位通常半天即可完成，整线配置（3台以上）一般 1-2 天。设备在出厂前已经完成全部调试和测试，到店安装就位后通电即可使用，无需额外调试时间。
support_install_faq_a3: 您可以选择由 {brand} 认证工程师上门安装，也可以自行安装——每台设备在发货前已经完成全部调试和测试，到货后通电即可正常使用。如果您有电工，自行安装非常简单。
support_install_faq_a4: 如果选择工程师上门安装，安装就位后工程师会通电确认设备运行正常，并提供验收报告和操作手册，同时现场培训您的厨师。如果选择自行安装，只需确认设备到货完好、通电正常即可开始使用。无论哪种方式，设备在出厂前均已完成全部调试和测试。
support_install_faq_a5: 安装费用包含工程师上门人工费和常规配件。我们先提供免费报价单，确认后再安排上门。没有隐形收费。
support_install_faq_a6: 单台设备安装通常需要几小时，对营业影响较小。整线安装我们会提前协商时间，尽量安排在非营业时段，最大限度减少对你的影响。
support_install_faq_a7: 整机保修1年（自验收合格日起），核心配件（IGBT模块、电磁线圈、锅体）保修3年，控制板12个月（非质量问题除外）。质保期内质量问题损坏的配件免费更换。
support_install_faq_a8: WhatsApp/电话/邮箱报修，紧急故障2小时内响应，60%以上故障可通过远程解决。

support_warranty_faq_a1: 所有设备统一享受 1 年质保，自验收合格日起算。质保期内因质量问题产生的故障，免费维修或更换（人为损坏及损耗件除外）。
support_warranty_faq_a2: {brand} 商用设备设计为连续 24 小时不间断运行。建议每运行 8-12 小时进行短暂休息和清洁维护，以保持最佳性能和延长设备寿命。
support_warranty_faq_a3: 质保期外的维修采取透明报价制度。工程师检测后提供详细报价单（含配件费+人工费），客户确认后才动手维修。没有任何隐形收费。如维修成本过高，我们也会建议更换方案供参考。
support_warranty_faq_a4: 建议在标准质保到期前 30 天联系我们申请延保。我们的售后团队会根据设备型号和使用状况提供定制延保方案和优惠报价。提前续保通常可享受 10-15% 的价格优惠。
support_warranty_faq_a5: 可以。{brand} 承诺停产机型备件供应不少于5年，确保您的设备在全生命周期内都能获得原厂配件支持。
support_warranty_faq_a6: 我们按故障严重程度分级响应：紧急故障1小时内响应，严重故障4小时内响应，一般故障24小时内响应，轻微故障48小时内响应。此外，60%以上的故障可通过远程诊断快速解决，无需等待工程师上门。

sr_pains_title: Common Pain Points for Small Restaurant Startups
sr_pains_subtitle: The hardest part isn't opening — it's keeping the kitchen running smoothly, the flavor consistent, and the service fast.
sr_pain1_title: Chefs Are Expensive and Hard to Retain
sr_pain2_body: A 10–15 m² kitchen has to fit prep tables, stoves, and a packing area. Traditional gas ranges turn the whole kitchen into an oven in summer — staff can barely stand it.
sr_pain3_body: Regulars come for your signature taste. Today Chef A cooks it, tomorrow Chef B — the regular takes one bite and asks "Did you change chefs?" That's how you lose customers.
sr_pain4_body: At 11:30, delivery and dine-in orders flood in simultaneously. Two woks can't keep up. Customers wait 20 minutes with no food — they cancel the order, and bad reviews arrive the next day.
sr_pain5_title: Kitchen Like a Furnace, Monthly Bills Shocking?
sr_pain5_body: Open-flame kitchens hit 40°C+ in summer. Staff can only endure 2 hours. Gas cylinders need replacing several times a month, electricity bills keep climbing — that's how profits get eaten.
sr_pain6_title: Equipment Breaks = Business Stops, No One to Fix It?
sr_pain6_body: At noon the stove breaks down. The next batch is prepped but can't cook. You call the supplier — they say 3–5 days. How do you serve for the next 3 days?
sr_solution_title: How to Survive the Lunch Rush in a 15 m² Kitchen?
sr_solution_desc: The answer isn't hiring more people — it's letting equipment do the work reliably. No chef needed, no large kitchen required. Set up the equipment and start serving.
sr_feat1_body: Countertop wok, induction cooker, stewing machine — fried rice, char kway teow, fried chicken, braised pork, all done on the countertop. No floor space needed.
sr_feat2_body: Nasi Goreng, Pad Thai, fried rice, braised pork — 1,000+ recipes with preset heat and stir-fry timing. Same flavor regardless of who operates.
sr_feat3_body: Temperature and timing are machine-controlled. No more burnt or undercooked dishes. New operators are independent in 30 minutes.
sr_feat4_body: Start with the XC60. As daily orders grow, upgrade to larger capacity models — no need to invest everything upfront. Add a unit when orders increase.
sr_equipment_title: New to the Business — Which Equipment Handles Peak Best?
sr_eq1_body: The first unit for any small restaurant. Fits on a countertop, serves fast — standard dishes ready in ~3 minutes. During peak, alternate between two woks.
sr_eq2_body: Soups, braised dishes, pre-prepared meals. Stew before service and hold in the insulated unit — serve directly at lunch without occupying the wok.
sr_eq3_body: Fried chicken, french fries, snacks — if your menu has fried items, you need this. Precise temperature, reliable batches every time.
sr_eq6_body: Only needed at 300+ daily orders. Large single-batch capacity — fewer flips, dozens more orders during peak.
sr_eq4_body: All ingredients cut and prepped 10 minutes before peak. The wok handles cooking — one person can run the whole show.
sr_eq5_body: Consider this when daily orders exceed 150. Larger capacity means fewer batches during peak — dozens more orders per shift.

sr_scenario_1_desc: No dine-in, delivery only. The kitchen just needs to cook fast and pack fast. One wok + one insulated server, 1–2 people is enough.
sr_scenario_2_desc: Dine-in and delivery at the same time — the kitchen must cook for both. Wok for mains, fryer for sides, stewing pot for soups — three lines running independently.
sr_scenario_3_desc: One kitchen running multiple brands — every square meter must produce. Equipment must switch items fast: one machine goes from stir-fried noodles to fried rice in 5 minutes.
sr_scenario_4_desc: Built on 1–2 signature dishes — the key is consistency. Equipment locks in the heat and rhythm so regulars keep coming back for your flavor.

cutting_faq2_a: Yes. Shred thickness, slice thickness, and dice size can be controlled by changing blades or adjusting parameters. Multiple specifications are typically available.

cutting_faq4_q: What capacity kitchens is this suitable for?

frying_pain_1_desc: Experienced cooks judge oil temp by eye. New staff can't do it, and different people produce different results.
frying_pain_2_desc: Don't change the oil and food tastes off. Change it too often and costs soar. Hard to find the right timing.
frying_pain_3_desc: High-temperature frying can cause smoke and fire at any moment. Kitchen safety is a constant concern.
frying_pain_4_desc: Crispy outside, tender inside, golden brown — these standards are nearly impossible to maintain batch after batch by hand.

sr_hero_subtitle: TRANSLATE: Whether you run a delivery-only shop, community fast food, specialty store, or cloud kitchen — Southeast Asian small restaurants all face the same problem: the kitchen can't keep up, staff keep leaving. Which one are you?

support_faq_hero_desc: TRANSLATE: Equipment issue? Our intelligent FAQ system helps you find solutions fast. 80% of common issues are resolved instantly online; complex problems are automatically escalated to specialist engineers with end-to-end tracking until resolution.
support_faq_cat_1_a4: TRANSLATE: Yes. We offer OEM badging and ODM co-development partnerships. Customization covers exterior design, feature configuration, dimensional specifications, and control systems. Typical lead time is 30–60 working days depending on complexity. Contact our sales team via WhatsApp or email to discuss your customization requirements.
support_faq_cat_2_a1: TRANSLATE: Follow these steps for first use: 1) Inspect for shipping damage inside and out; 2) Verify voltage matches the nameplate before powering on; 3) Run idle for 5–10 minutes on first power-up and check for anomalies; 4) Familiarize yourself with buttons and parameter settings via the operation manual; 5) Clean the interior before putting into service. Our engineers provide on-site training during installation to ensure your staff can operate proficiently.
support_faq_cat_2_a2: TRANSLATE: Yes. {brand} smart devices support custom recipe import via USB or Wi-Fi. Create recipes on the control panel by setting temperature, time, stirring speed and other parameters, then save as preset programs. We also provide a built-in recipe library covering Chinese stir-fry, Western baking, Southeast Asian cuisines and more. Contact technical support for the recipe management tool if you need batch import.
support_faq_cat_2_a3: TRANSLATE: {brand} commercial equipment is designed for 24/7 continuous operation. We recommend a short rest and cleaning every 8–12 hours to maintain peak performance and extend service life. Built-in overheat protection automatically shuts down the unit if temperature exceeds safe limits; restart after cooling.
support_faq_cat_3_a2: TRANSLATE: Order through these channels: 1) Spare Parts Support page on this website; 2) WhatsApp our parts specialist; 3) Email sales.kitchen@yukoli.com. We stock 500+ genuine spare part SKUs in our Southeast Asia regional warehouse with 48-hour dispatch for standard parts. Provide your equipment model and photos of the required part to ensure precise matching.
support_faq_cat_4_a2: TRANSLATE: {brand} products are exported to 68+ countries and regions worldwide, with a focus on Southeast Asia including Thailand, Vietnam, Malaysia, Indonesia, the Philippines, Singapore, Myanmar, and Cambodia. We also export to the Middle East, Africa, and South America. All export equipment carries CE, ISO, ROHS and other international certifications meeting import standards worldwide. Contact our sales team to confirm specific country availability.
